name: JengaBench
description: Evaluates visual-spatial reasoning and strategic decision-making in a deterministic 3D Jenga environment.

binding_vow.description: Inspect rendered JengaBench camera views and return one flat JSON ChangeViewpoint, Push, or PlaceBack action per turn. Every action includes a short context rationale.

observation_space.description: A PNG render from the current persistent camera viewpoint. The system_prompt includes camera state, phase, extraction count, available placement positions, and a windowed action log (last 5 entries, most recent first). Each log entry has three fields: saw (camera state before acting), did (the action taken), why (the outcome).

action_space.description: Return one flat JSON action object. Every action includes three reasoning fields: `see` (what you observe in the image), `do` (why you chose this action), `next` (your plan after this). The remaining fields describe either ChangeViewpoint with compass direction, elevation layer, Close/Medium/Full distance, and optional target block; Push with layer, positional color, axial face, left/center/right contact, and Gentle/Firm/Hard intensity; or PlaceBack with an available Left/Middle/Right slot.

reward.description: Successful extractions score +1, valid camera changes and placements score 0, invalid actions score -0.5, collapse terminates the episode, and ten turns without a successful extraction terminate with -1.
